title: An Act to Allow Federal Civil Service to Count for Purposes of Maine Public Employees Retirement System Benefits
last_house_action: 5/29/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/2/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on March 12, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-145) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-145) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-145) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
